meta.title: [TR] OWL Intelligence — Advanced Analytics Grounded in Field Data
meta.description: [TR] Decision-support products for institutions combining validated field data, structured analytics, and AI.

hero.headline: [TR] Advanced Analytics Grounded in Field Data
hero.body: [TR] OWL Intelligence develops decision-support products for institutions by combining validated field data, structured analytics, and AI governed within a clear oversight framework.
hero.metric1Label: [TR] Provinces of field coverage across Turkey
hero.metric3Label: [TR] AI-supported decision products in the ecosystem

businessSpeed.eyebrow: [TR] Business Moves Faster Than Traditional Data
businessSpeed.statement1: [TR] Static measurement cannot keep pace with changing conditions.
businessSpeed.statement3: [TR] Better decisions require higher-frequency, ground-level evidence.

value.heading: [TR] Measurement, analytics, and AI in one decision-support layer
value.body: [TR] OWL Intelligence brings measurement, analytics, and AI together within a single decision-support layer. It continuously monitors real-world conditions, processes emerging signals, and makes them usable for institutional contexts.
value.col1Body: [TR] Continuously monitors real-world conditions through structured fieldwork and validated data pipelines.
value.col2Body: [TR] Transforms raw signals into analytical structures that connect directly to decision-making processes.
value.col3Body: [TR] Governed AI layers interpret findings, explain patterns, and deliver decision-ready intelligence.

productEcosystem.heading: [TR] An integrated structure that turns field data into stronger decisions
productEcosystem.intro: [TR] Our product ecosystem provides an integrated structure that turns field data into stronger measurement, analysis, and decision support.
productEcosystem.fwbmDescriptor: [TR] Next-generation household financial resilience measurement at institutional scale.
productEcosystem.fuzzyowlDescriptor: [TR] Makes visible which variables shape decisions, how they influence each other, and how interventions affect the system as a whole.

intelligenceLayer.heading: [TR] Eight integrated stages from raw signal to institutional decision
intelligenceLayer.step01Body: [TR] Each product begins with an embedded methodology that defines what is measured and how it is measured.
intelligenceLayer.step02Body: [TR] A regular, structured, and highly reliable flow of real-world data is generated through fieldwork.
intelligenceLayer.step03Body: [TR] The AuditorAI layer subjects the data to quality, consistency, and validation checks, creating a fully validated foundation.
intelligenceLayer.step04Body: [TR] Validated field data is brought together with integrated databases and relevant external data sources within a single data structure.
intelligenceLayer.step05Body: [TR] The ClassifyAI layer organizes the data into meaningful categories, labels it, and prepares it for analysis.
intelligenceLayer.step06Body: [TR] Deterministic computation engines consistently generate indicators, scores, segments, and decision rules.
intelligenceLayer.step07Body: [TR] Processed data becomes trackable, comparable, and ready for institutional use through live dashboards.
intelligenceLayer.step08Body: [TR] Governed AI analysis assistants such as Monet and FuzzyOwl interpret findings, explain patterns, and complete the analytical layer.

sectors.heading: [TR] Built for institutions that operate at complexity
sectors.context: [TR] Nine sectors. One coherent intelligence infrastructure.

whyOwl.heading: [TR] Not a research firm. An intelligence infrastructure.
whyOwl.intro: [TR] Unlike conventional research firms, OWL Intelligence does not leave data confined to reports; it turns data into productized analytics and decision support. With more than 15 years of experience, a field network spanning all 81 provinces of Turkey, and in-house technology capabilities, it transforms research into an infrastructure that operates at institutional scale.
whyOwl.diff1Body: [TR] Drawing on deep methodological expertise shaped by national and international projects, our team specializes in quantitative, qualitative, mixed, and experimental methods.
whyOwl.diff2Body: [TR] OWL Intelligence does not simply collect data; it transforms it into analytical structures that connect directly to decision-making processes.
whyOwl.diff3Body: [TR] Our technology and software infrastructure is developed in-house and designed with a product logic.

founders.heading: [TR] Built from a conviction, not a gap in the market

beyza.quote: [TR] We built OWL because institutions kept making critical decisions on data that was already six months old — and the technology to fix that already existed.
beyza.name: [TR] Beyza Polat, Ph.D.
beyza.credential: [TR] Economist. Bilkent University · London School of Economics.

saygin.quote: [TR] Field research told us everything we needed to know. The gap was never the data — it was the infrastructure to make it actionable at scale.
saygin.name: [TR] Saygın Vedat Alkurt
saygin.credential: [TR] Sociologist. Middle East Technical University. 15+ years in data-driven research.

partnerships.heading: [TR] Open to those who want to build and grow together
partnerships.body: [TR] OWL Intelligence is open to working with stakeholders who want to build, grow, and open up new areas together. We see strategic partnerships and institutional collaboration as a natural part of our long-term vision.

agent.heading: [TR] Ask anything you would like to know about OWL Intelligence.
agent.subCopy: [TR] Our AI agent is available to answer questions about our products, methodology, and how we work with institutions.

contactDemo.heading: [TR] Start a conversation.
contactDemo.body: [TR] Whether you're exploring for your institution, looking to invest, or interested in collaboration, we're ready to talk.
contactDemo.cardHeading: [TR] Ready to see it in action?

solutions.bankingDesc: Finansal karar alma için risk değerlendirmesi, tüketici güven takibi ve pazar duyarlılığı.
solutions.fmcgDesc: Tüketici davranış içgörüleri, marka algısı izleme ve talep tahminleme.
solutions.publicDesc: Politika etki analizi, kamuoyu duyarlılığı takibi ve kanıta dayalı yönetişim desteği.
solutions.investorsDesc: Yatırım kararları için alternatif veri, ESG duyarlılık takibi ve pazar istihbaratı.
solutions.researchDesc: Strateji ekipleri, danışmanlıklar ve akademik araştırma için derin analitik araçlar.

footer.description: Gerçek saha verisine dayalı yapay zeka destekli istihbarat ürünleri.

contact.title: İletişim
contact.description: OWL Intelligence'ın işletmenize nasıl yardımcı olabileceğini görüşmek için ekibimizle iletişime geçin.
contact.name: Ad Soyad
contact.success: Teşekkürler! En kısa sürede sizinle iletişime geçeceğiz.
contact.error: Bir hata oluştu. Lütfen tekrar deneyin.
